author: ninglg
description: Auto-renders markdown headings as a colorful, interactive mindmap — no extra syntax required. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Light Ning
manifest.description: Feature-rich mindmap plugin — multiple layouts, themes, node shapes & line styles, wikilink support, node collapse, PNG export — all from plain markdown headings, no custom syntax needed.
manifest.name: Light Mindmap

name: Light Mindmap

releases.author: ninglg
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Node Drag**: Drag nodes to change parent or reorder siblings on the canvas
- **Optimized Node Editing**: Improved node editing experience and visual feedback

## 更新内容

- **节点拖拽**：支持拖拽节点更改父节点或调整同级顺序
- **优化节点编辑**：改进节点编辑体验和视觉反馈

releases.author: ninglg
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Drag and Drop**: Drag nodes to change hierarchy or reorder siblings
  - Drag to center of another node to make it a child
  - Drag to top/bottom of another node to reorder

## 更新内容

- **拖拽功能**: 支持鼠标拖拽节点调整层级和顺序
  - 拖拽到另一个节点的中心区域可将其变为子节点
  - 拖拽到另一个节点的上方或下方区域可调整顺序

releases.author: ninglg
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Fix mention popup positioning**: Wiki-link autocomplete popup now renders correctly when Obsidian workspace containers have CSS transforms applied.

## 更新内容

- **修复提及弹窗定位**：修复了当 Obsidian 工作区容器存在 CSS transform 时，Wiki 链接自动补全弹窗位置偏移的问题。

releases.author: ninglg
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Wiki-link support**: Markdown links and wiki-links in headings are clickable — external links open in browser, internal notes open in a new Obsidian tab
- **Mention autocomplete**: Type `[[` while editing a node to search vault notes with a dropdown popup
- **Collapse fix**: Fixed asterisks appearing around collapsed node text

## 更新内容

- **双向链接支持**：脑图节点中的 Markdown 链接和 Wiki 链接均可点击跳转，外部链接在浏览器打开，内部笔记在新标签页打开
- **Wiki 链接自动补全**：编辑节点时输入 [[ 触发笔记搜索弹窗，支持键盘导航和鼠标选择
- **折叠标记修复**：修复折叠节点文字两侧显示星号的问题

releases.author: ninglg
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Node Context Menu**: Right-click on any node to open a context menu with quick actions
  - Edit node text directly
  - Add sibling node (not available on root)
  - Add child node (auto-expands if collapsed)
  - Collapse / expand toggle (only for nodes with children)
  - Delete node (not available on root)
- **Bilingual support**: Context menu automatically displays in Chinese or English based on Obsidian language setting

## 新增功能

- **节点右键菜单**：右键点击任意节点弹出快捷操作菜单
  - 编辑节点文本
  - 创建同级节点（根节点不可用）
  - 创建下级节点（已折叠时自动展开）
  - 折叠/展开切换（仅对有子节点的节点可用）
  - 删除节点（根节点不可用）
- **多语言支持**：上下文菜单根据 Obsidian 语言设置自动显示中文或英文

releases.author: ninglg
releases.description:
## Changes
- Add **Tree** and **Radial** layout modes
- Change layout selector from buttons to dropdown
- Fix Enter key: confirm edit only (no auto-add sibling)
- Fix PNG export: align canvas font-size, padding, and letter-spacing with CSS
- Optimize connection curves for Tree and Radial layouts

releases.author: ninglg
releases.description: 新增外链支持 / Add external link support

releases.author: ninglg
releases.description:
## 1.2.1

- Borderless style: text-only at all depth levels
- Lazy render hidden mindmaps
- Update FAB text to 'Light Mindmap'

releases.author: ninglg
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Collapse / Expand nodes** — press Space to toggle; collapsed state is persisted in markdown
- **Collapse badge** — collapsed nodes show a + indicator after text, visible in both the canvas and exported PNGs
- **Slate theme** — new mid-tone blue-grey theme with a subtle tech grid background
- **Touch support** — drag to pan and pinch to zoom on touch devices

## Improvements

- Tab on a collapsed node auto-expands it and adds a new child
- Double-click or F2 on a collapsed node auto-expands it and enters edit mode
- Enter on the root node no longer creates a sibling
- Balanced layout preserves left/right side assignment when collapsing or expanding
- Returning from source view auto-fits the mindmap to the viewport
- Borderless node style now renders correctly in PNG export

## Removed

- 1:1 zoom button (use Fit instead)

releases.author: ninglg
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Doodle Node Style**: Hand-drawn look with slight rotation and irregular borders
- **PNG Export**: Export mindmap as high-resolution PNG image via toolbar button
